ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Timepoint/visit label
Notes: e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: I am able to tolerate and manage well most of my emotions
Notes: 0=This describes me totally; 1=This describes me a lot; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a little; 4=This does not describe me at all

ElementDescription: My self-esteem is easily affected if I experience failures or disappointments
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I feel a great emptiness inside me
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I tend to confuse my own emotions with those of others
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I feel confused about who I really am
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I recognize myself in how others describe me
Notes: 0=This describes me totally; 1=This describes me a lot; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a little; 4=This does not describe me at all

ElementDescription: I often feel like my life has no meaning
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I set reasonable goals for myself and I take realistic measures to achieve them
Notes: 0=This describes me totally; 1=This describes me a lot; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a little; 4=This does not describe me at all

ElementDescription: Sometimes I don't understand why I behaved in a certain way or why I made some decisions
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: My actions and my decisions are guided by my immediate needs, regardless of the rest
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I often change my plans and my life goals
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: My actions and my decisions are consistent with my values and beliefs
Notes: 0=This describes me totally; 1=This describes me a lot; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a little; 4=This does not describe me at all

ElementDescription: People often react negatively to my words or my actions, and I can't quite figure out why
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: People blame me for being insensitive to others
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I am often confused about why people act in a certain way towards me
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I have little interest for other people's feelings or problems
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: During discussions, I am curious and interested in other people's point of view
Notes: 0=This describes me totally; 1=This describes me a lot; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a little; 4=This does not describe me at all

ElementDescription: When someone doesn't think like me or contradicts me, I tend to react negatively or angrily, even if the person was respectful
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I have many interpersonal relationships that are satisfying for me and the other person
Notes: 0=This describes me totally; 1=This describes me a lot; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a little; 4=This does not describe me at all

ElementDescription: In general, my friendships or love relationships do not last very long
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: If I am in relationships with others, it is first and foremost because I want them to satisfy some of my needs
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I don't really feel desire or interest to maintain a relationship with others
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I don't trust others and prefer to keep some distance with them to avoid being abused
Notes: 0=This does not describe me at all; 1=This describes me a little; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a lot; 4=This describes me totally

ElementDescription: I have in my life many persons with whom I feel close and with whom I have a relationship made of respect, affection and mutual support
Notes: 0=This describes me totally; 1=This describes me a lot; 2=This describes me moderately; 3=This describes me a little; 4=This does not describe me at all

ElementDescription: Identity Subscale Score
Notes: Sum of items 1(reverse scored), 2, 3, 4, 5, 6(reverse scored), 7

ElementDescription: Self-Direction Subscale Score
Notes: Sum of items 8(reverse scored), 9, 10, 11, 12(reverse scored)

ElementDescription: Empathy Subscale Score
Notes: Sum of items 13, 14, 15, 16, 17(reverse scored), 18

ElementDescription: Intimacy Subscale Score
Notes: Sum of items 19(reverse scored), 20, 21, 22, 23, 24(reverse scored)
